about.labDescription1: Hello, as described at the beginning, this is a space (laboratory) where I write texts, structure pages, and even create some small applications and tools to practice programming or to facilitate my daily life (see the class schedule).
about.labDescription2: Here it will work as a relatively simple Single Page Application (SPA) where I will gradually add more features.
about.labDescription3: I also intend to write small articles on the blog related to Pharmacy/Medicine and record some things from academic daily life.
about.puyuTooltip: This is Puyu, the mascot of this place. She is a scientist and her colors are to stand out in the general pink/blue theme here. Her name can have several meanings, but it is more inspired by 'puyu', which in Japanese means 'piece of paper', representing this space as a place of notes and simplicity.
about.futureProjectsDesc: Projects I have in mind to implement here at some point. They are subject to change and depend on my availability throughout life's journey.
about.medicationListDesc: Gradually I want to add a list of medications and herbal medicines (mainly those available at the popular pharmacy and in the public health system).
about.calculatorsDesc: From simple drug dose calculators to other useful tools.
about.scienceCommunicationDesc: In the future, in a dedicated section, as I learn more and participate more in the scientific community, I want to bring accessible science communication texts.
about.drugInteractionsDesc: A tool I would like to create, mainly in relation to already registered medications, highlighting dangerous mixtures.
about.authorBio1: Hello, my name is Juliana Tiemi, but you can call me Ju, Tiemi, Mochiemi, Mochi, etc. I don't have much preference for pronouns, but I'm used to She/Her. I also have a funny nickname I like: Diferentona or 'Dif'.
about.authorBio2: I was born in São Paulo in 1994, lived ten years in Botucatu/SP, and now in 2026 I begin my journey to Alfenas/MG. I have four cats (photos of them below) and live with them and my husband.
about.authorBio3: In general, I'm the type of person who likes to stay at home. Some days I'm quiet, it's rarer but there are days I talk too much too. I'm neurodivergent with a late diagnosis learning why I suffered so much and today sometimes I'm cold.
about.funFact1Desc: The first thing I 'wanted to be when I grew up' was a singer at age 6 because of Sandy & Junior, then between ages 8-12 I wanted to be a veterinarian. Today I'm a student.
about.funFact2Title: Started 2 Other Degrees and Didn't Finish
about.funFact2Desc: 2013 - Poli-USP Engineering (failed in the 1st semester) and 2016-2023 - Unesp - Medicine (Failed burnout).
about.funFact3Desc: Well, I'm the older sister among three and the only one with a maternal surname. My parents thought my name was too long to write and decided not to repeat that with the other two.
